math_definition: RReLU(x) = max(0,x) + a*min(0,x), where a=Uniform(lower,upper) in training mode and a=(lower+upper)/2 in eval mode. Params: lower=0.125, upper=1/3, training=False

ranking_rationale: hardshrink=closest structural match: uses packed_scalar runtime arg, fill_tile+ltz_tile+mul conditional pattern in dedicated kernel; swish=shows v_if(x<0) SFPU conditional branch and multiply pattern in ckernel inline code; hardtanh=two-float-parameter registration pattern (is_parametrized_type) matching rrelu lower+upper params; frac=shows v_if/v_endif sign-based branching on exp<0 in SFPU ckernel, same structural loop template; where_tss=two packed scalar runtime args pattern in program_factory, shows exactly how to pass two float params (lower,upper) to kernel
